programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Biggest Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face the biggest mystery box challenge ever.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - The Last Supper
programme.desc: The Top 13 contestants cook the meal they would choose for their Last Supper.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants cook for 1800 passengers aboard cruise ship Dawn Princess.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from yesterday's challenge must cook-off to keep their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge: Five Tastes
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at the MasterChef Australia kitchen to find Marco Pierre White there to greet them.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: Three contestants with the least impressive dish from previous invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test are vying for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Mystery Fridge
programme.desc: The Top 13 duos each cook a main and a dessert with the contents of 13 different fridges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pub Lunch
programme.desc: Nine contestants on the losing team face elimination challenges that include three knockout rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 5
programme.desc: In a masterclass edition, Gary cooks a succulent roasted pork rack with braised vegetables.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box & Seafood from Around the World with Rick Stein
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are given a single egg and asked to make it the hero of their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Greek Salad
programme.desc: Characters: 0 | Words: 0 Dalvinder, Audra and Andrew are given 3.5 hours to reproduce George's 'Greek Salad'.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Jamie Oliver
programme.desc: Jules, Alice and Tregan are the three lucky contestants who face off against renowned chef Jamie Oliver.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Shangri La Hotel 24-Hour Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants faced a 24-Hour Team Challenge, running a day's service at the Shangri-La hotel in Sydney.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: The losing red team heads back to the kitchen, where the teammates face a rapid fire Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 6
programme.desc: Paul Wilson creates a traditional Mexican mole with lamb cutlets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: MasterChef Australia Winners
programme.desc: Past MasterChef winners Julie, Adam and Kate return to the kitchen for an all-star mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - A Culinary Journey
programme.desc: The Top 11 MasterChef contestants visit Kauri Cliffs resort in Northland for a MasterClass.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Nose to Tail
programme.desc: The Top 11 contestants face a nose-to-tail challenge in which each must cook a different cut of pork.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Go Protein
programme.desc: Guest chef Eugene Hamilton from Euro restaurant joins MasterChef judges to cook 3 protein-packed main courses.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Baking
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants bake a sponge cake for guest chef Natalie Oldfield.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Auditions
programme.desc: The competition kicks off with 1000 amateur cooks.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Finding The Top 12
programme.desc: The Top 24 amateur cooks face three gruelling challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - 12 Ways With Chicken
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants move into a luxury home on Auckland's North Shore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Signature Dish Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 11 contestants face a tough challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP6
programme.desc: A newly married woman from Kansas City, Kan., plays a game with six $1 million cases.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: A hot-dog merchant from Nevada and a teacher from Pennsylvania compete for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.desc: A teacher from Pennsylvania returns to finish her game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The game gets hairy for a barber from Ohio, who plays for $2 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: A woman from Florida continues her quest to score the big prize. Then a Minnesota math teacher hopes it will all add up for a million-dollar win.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: A Minnesota teacher tries to chalk up a win. Then a part-time bartender from Massachusetts plays, hoping to tap into some cash to open a bar.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP22
programme.desc: 4 contestants, from Ohio, Connecticut and 2 from California - battle it out in a special speed game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Bingo To A Million
programme.desc: Playing for his Golden Girls-style dream home, former Bingo caller Tony Oriente.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Looking For Luck (In All The Right Cases)
programme.desc: Nurse Andrew Shelton declares himself the unluckiest person ever to combat The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Flying High
programme.desc: Poker player Shireen Mui goes all in against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Roller Coaster In Motion
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal comes to life with two Orlando contestants taking over.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Magic Touch
programme.desc: In another incredible combo game of Deal or No Deal, two new contestants fill the studio with magical moments.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Single mother and marathoner Monica Durazo comes from a sales background and a family of competitors.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - A Day At The Races
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants have a day at the races at Ellerslie.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Pie Wars
programme.desc: The Top 9 contestants must make their own pastry and cook two pies.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: Relay
programme.desc: ll five members of the team with the least impressive dish will go into tomorrow's elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The Queen of the Australian kitchen, Maggie Beer returns to the MasterChef Australia kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The Queen of the Australian kitchen, Maggie Beer returns to the MasterChef Australia kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: Today's pressure test has been set by a rising star in the dessert world, guest chef Anna.

programme.desc: The Top 13 duos each cook a main and a dessert with the contents of 13 different fridges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Pie Wars
programme.desc: The Top 9 contestants must make their own pastry and cook two pies.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Auditions
programme.desc: The hit local cooking competition is back, bigger and better than ever before.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Whole Chicken
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants face a sudden death challenge to find who will go through to the Top 16.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Loaf
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef mansion on Auckland's North Shore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Takeaways
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must cook three classic takeaway dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - The Navy
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants make canapés for 130 guests on board the HMNZS Canterbury.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Moo Chow Chow
programme.desc: The Top 13 face their spiciest challenge yet: to cook two dishes for guest chef Che Barrington.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - La Cigale
programme.desc: A Mystery Box Challenge has the cooks baking from the heart.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #1
programme.desc: MasterClass turns the tables and puts the MasterChef judges in the spotlight.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Frozen, Canned & Packaged
programme.desc: The remaining cooks compete in teams for a gourmet sausage challenge in celebration of Oktoberfest.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #2
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh, Simon and Ray cook three simple but tasty dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Hawkes Bay
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants travel to Hawkes Bay for an invention test using spring lamb and fresh local produce.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #3
programme.desc: MasterClass turns the tables and puts the MasterChef judges in the spotlight.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Cake
programme.desc: The Top Eight contestants make a hamburger cake and a milkshake for baking maestro Mathew Metcalfe

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #4
programme.desc: Guest chef Mathew Metcalfe joins Josh Emett and Ray McVinnie to make three delectable desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Young Guns
programme.desc: The top seven contestants cook fine dining dishes for three guest chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #5
programme.desc: Guest chef Nick Honeyman cooks three very different examples of modern New Zealand cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Huka Lodge
programme.desc: The top six contestants cook a course each from the gourmet dinner menu at iconic Huka Lodge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #6
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws from Huka Lodge joins Josh Emett and Simon Gault to cook three hearty meat dishes.

programme.desc: Laura Siano plans to save, spend and share; this game comes with martinis and male models.

programme.desc: Flight attendant, Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures.

programme.desc: Cheerleader Tex Iniguez shakes her pom poms past six figures in hopes of beating The Banker.
